A_mcp_layer_live_on_main.description: Worker is live, McpAgent layer merged to chittyentity main, SVC_* binding in chittymcp/wrangler.jsonc and SERVICE_MAP. Aggregator deployed with 38 service bindings. 153 tools live via mcp.chitty.cc/mcp (tools/list). Last 2 added: cloudflare + finance via chittyentity PR #292 + chittymcp PR #85.

C_not_an_mcp_candidate.description: React/UI worker (app.tsx, client.tsx) — not an MCP server. Excluded from the wrap loop.

endpoint_migration.tracking: chittyentity commit d2cc353 (feat: canonicalize {name}.chitty.cc per user override)

policy_filters._note: IMPLEMENTED as category-based aggregate sub-views in src/worker/index.ts (VIEW_CATEGORIES). The prior domain:/surface:/audience: tag filters were doc-only and never enforced. Each SERVICE_MAP entry carries a `category`; POST /{view}/mcp filters to that category and reuses the full aggregate pipeline.
policy_filters.ch1tty: (separate OAuth gateway, not a chittymcp sub-view)

next_actions: Naming cleanup: shell-worker tool names contain hyphens (lead-score_status, lease-execute_status, bridge-consent_status, human-escalator_status, lease-explain_status). Mechanical sed-rename to snake_case per SOP §3.

Implement real tool bodies beyond <service>_status for the 6 shell workers (availability, buyflow, lead-score, lease-execute, lease-explain, quote) — each needs domain-specific tools wired to its Hyperdrive backend.
Aggregator worker (src/worker/index.ts): remove the dead MCP_REGISTRY KV path (PR #63) since static SERVICE_MAP now fully covers 38 services. ~150 LOC simplification.
Custom domain limit (100 per chitty.cc zone) still affects twilio, bridge-consent, human-escalator, finance, cloudflare (workers.dev only). Consider zone split or domain pruning.

session_log_2026_05_27.coverage_change: 9 → 38 of 39 services (23% → 97%; remaining 1 is ui which is not an MCP candidate)
